text.title: Laravel Framework Fundamentals Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for setting up a Laravel module idiomatically.

step.name: define-contracts
step.action: Create interface `Contracts/MailService.php` with method signatures. Create impl `Services/SendgridMailService.php` implementing the contract.

step.name: create-provider
step.action: Create `Providers/PaymentServiceProvider.php`; in `register()` call `$this->app->bind(MailService::class, SendgridMailService::class);`. Register in `config/app.php` providers array.

step.name: move-env-to-config
step.action: Audit code for env() outside config. Move each to `config/<group>.php`. Reference via `config(...)` in services.

step.name: constructor-inject-services
step.action: Refactor services: replace `Mail::send(...)` with `$this->mailService->send(...)`; inject via __construct.
step.decision-gate: If facade remains in service class, STOP and refactor.

step.name: wire-middleware-and-cache
step.action: Move repeated auth/CORS/rate-limit checks to middleware. Run `php artisan route:cache && config:cache` in deploy script.
